steps.title: Use the ratio scale factor
steps.content: The ratio $x:y$ is $8:3$. Since $x=184$, compare $184$ to the ratio part $8$: $$184\div 8=23$$ So the actual values are $23$ times the ratio parts.

steps.title: Scale the y-part
steps.content: The $y$-part of the ratio is $3$, so $$y=3\cdot 23=69$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The pair $(x,y)=(184,69)$ keeps the ratio because $$\frac{184}{69}=\frac{8}{3}$$ Enter 69.
